mapper.sql: id, tournament_id, user_id, status, create_time, update_time
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO tournament_player (tournament_id, user_id, status) VALUES (#{tournamentId}, #{userId}, #{status})

INSERT INTO tournament_player (tournament_id, user_id, status) VALUES
(#{item.tournamentId}, #{item.userId}, #{item.status})
mapper.select: SELECT FROM tournament_player WHERE tournament_id = #{tournamentId} ORDER BY create_time DESC

SELECT rel_id AS relId, tournament_id AS tournamentId, tournament_name AS tournamentName, user_id AS userId, username, jersey_name AS jerseyName, jersey_number AS jerseyNumber, position, team_id AS teamId, team_name AS teamName, team_short_name AS teamShortName, team_logo AS teamLogo, team_gender AS teamGender, team_gender_name AS teamGenderName, team_sport_type AS teamSportType, team_sport_type_name AS teamSportTypeName, role, role_name AS roleName, portrait_photo AS portraitPhoto, player_status AS playerStatus, player_status_name AS playerStatusName, register_time AS registerTime FROM v_tournament_player_info WHERE tournament_id = #{tournamentId} ORDER BY register_time DESC

SELECT rel_id AS relId, tournament_id AS tournamentId, tournament_name AS tournamentName, user_id AS userId, username, jersey_name AS jerseyName, jersey_number AS jerseyNumber, position, team_id AS teamId, team_name AS teamName, team_short_name AS teamShortName, team_logo AS teamLogo, team_gender AS teamGender, team_gender_name AS teamGenderName, team_sport_type AS teamSportType, team_sport_type_name AS teamSportTypeName, role, role_name AS roleName, portrait_photo AS portraitPhoto, player_status AS playerStatus, player_status_name AS playerStatusName, register_time AS registerTime FROM v_tournament_player_info WHERE tournament_id = #{tournamentId} AND team_id = #{teamId} ORDER BY register_time DESC
